doesn't like that.

like...

you.

default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on content progress and discuss the partnership's future.](https://fathom.video/share/sxUK4RdAsuM497v5y24LViiXUdSM8XbV?tab=summary&timestamp=382.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Partnership Paused:** No auto-renewal. The partnership is paused after 8 weeks due to zero new content published, preventing any measurement of value.](https://fathom.video/share/sxUK4RdAsuM497v5y24LViiXUdSM8XbV?tab=summary&timestamp=1274.0)
  - [**Content Blocked:** 10 articles are ready for review (5 new, 5 post-review), but publication is blocked by Ben's approval and missing Framer CMS access for GrowthX.](https://fathom.video/share/sxUK4RdAsuM497v5y24LViiXUdSM8XbV?tab=summary&timestamp=410.0)
  - [**New Glossary Format:** A new "complete guide" format for glossary articles (e.g., "What Is Invoice Processing?") will boost SEO and LLM parsing.](https://fathom.video/share/sxUK4RdAsuM497v5y24LViiXUdSM8XbV?tab=summary&timestamp=466.0)
  - [**Website Discoverability Issue:** A critical P1 website issue (poor LLM discoverability) is diverting LightSource's resources and delaying the implementation of new blog CTAs.](https://fathom.video/share/sxUK4RdAsuM497v5y24LViiXUdSM8XbV?tab=summary&timestamp=998.0)

## Topics

### Partnership Status

  - [**Concern:** Spencer Penn noted zero new content has been published in 8 weeks, making it impossible to measure value or ROI.](https://fathom.video/share/sxUK4RdAsuM497v5y24LViiXUdSM8XbV?tab=summary&timestamp=1375.0)
  - [**Clarification:** The contract requires an explicit opt-in for renewal, not an auto-renewal.](https://fathom.video/share/sxUK4RdAsuM497v5y24LViiXUdSM8XbV?tab=summary&timestamp=1316.0)
  - [**Decision:** The partnership is paused. The team will first publish the backlog, measure performance, and then reassess.](https://fathom.video/share/sxUK4RdAsuM497v5y24LViiXUdSM8XbV?tab=summary&timestamp=1523.0)

### Content Production & Blockers

  - [**Backlog:** 10 articles are in the review queue.](https://fathom.video/share/sxUK4RdAsuM497v5y24LViiXUdSM8XbV?tab=summary&timestamp=410.0)
      - [5 articles are new.](https://fathom.video/share/sxUK4RdAsuM497v5y24LViiXUdSM8XbV?tab=summary&timestamp=410.0)
      - [5 articles are post-review, awaiting final sign-off.](https://fathom.video/share/sxUK4RdAsuM497v5y24LViiXUdSM8XbV?tab=summary&timestamp=410.0)
  - [**Process Refinement:** GrowthX is incorporating feedback to reduce "AI-isms" and ensure examples are highly specific to LightSource's brand and audience.](https://fathom.video/share/sxUK4RdAsuM497v5y24LViiXUdSM8XbV?tab=summary&timestamp=440.0)
  - [**Blockers:**](https://fathom.video/share/sxUK4RdAsuM497v5y24LViiXUdSM8XbV?tab=summary&timestamp=410.0)
      - [**Approval:** Ben Hoehn must approve the 10 articles.](https://fathom.video/share/sxUK4RdAsuM497v5y24LViiXUdSM8XbV?tab=summary&timestamp=410.0)
      - [**Access:** GrowthX needs Framer CMS access to stage articles for publication.](https://fathom.video/share/sxUK4RdAsuM497v5y24LViiXUdSM8XbV?tab=summary&timestamp=410.0)
          - [An invite was sent to the `pod zero` email, but the associated account was linked to a personal email.](https://fathom.video/share/sxUK4RdAsuM497v5y24LViiXUdSM8XbV?tab=summary&timestamp=1079.0)
          - [Ben will provide the CMS login link for the team to investigate.](https://fathom.video/share/sxUK4RdAsuM497v5y24LViiXUdSM8XbV?tab=summary&timestamp=1083.0)

### New Initiatives

  - [**Glossary Articles:**](https://fathom.video/share/sxUK4RdAsuM497v5y24LViiXUdSM8XbV?tab=summary&timestamp=466.0)
      - [**Format:** "Complete guide" structure (Definition → Importance → Best Practices → FAQ).](https://fathom.video/share/sxUK4RdAsuM497v5y24LViiXUdSM8XbV?tab=summary&timestamp=466.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Aligns with SEO best practices for AI Overviews and improves LLM parsing for citations.](https://fathom.video/share/sxUK4RdAsuM497v5y24LViiXUdSM8XbV?tab=summary&timestamp=466.0)
      - [**Implementation:** Ben will ask the web team to create a new `/glossary` section in Framer, cloning the blog's CMS structure.](https://fathom.video/share/sxUK4RdAsuM497v5y24LViiXUdSM8XbV?tab=summary&timestamp=633.0)
  - [**Inline CTAs:**](https://fathom.video/share/sxUK4RdAsuM497v5y24LViiXUdSM8XbV?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
      - [**Goal:** Drive user exploration from blog posts to other site pages (e.g., product, customer stories).](https://fathom.video/share/sxUK4RdAsuM497v5y24LViiXUdSM8XbV?tab=summary&timestamp=909.0)
      - [**Mechanism:** Visually distinct call-out boxes (not just text links), inspired by Semrush's blog.](https://fathom.video/share/sxUK4RdAsuM497v5y24LViiXUdSM8XbV?tab=summary&timestamp=822.0)
      - [**Tracking:** Performance will be measured using UTM codes in Google Analytics.](https://fathom.video/share/sxUK4RdAsuM497v5y24LViiXUdSM8XbV?tab=summary&timestamp=970.0)
      - [**Status:** A P2 priority for LightSource, behind the P1 website discoverability fix.](https://fathom.video/share/sxUK4RdAsuM497v5y24LViiXUdSM8XbV?tab=summary&timestamp=998.0)

### Reporting & Analytics

  - [**GSC Access:** Still required for the Looker dashboard.](https://fathom.video/share/sxUK4RdAsuM497v5y24LViiXUdSM8XbV?tab=summary&timestamp=680.0)
  - [**Scrunch Reports:** New prompts have been added. GrowthX will now download and share weekly PDF reports in Slack.](https://fathom.video/share/sxUK4RdAsuM497v5y24LViiXUdSM8XbV?tab=summary&timestamp=690.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Ben Hoehn:**](https://fathom.video/share/sxUK4RdAsuM497v5y24LViiXUdSM8XbV?tab=summary&timestamp=1027.0)
      - [Review and approve the 10 articles in the queue tonight.](https://fathom.video/share/sxUK4RdAsuM497v5y24LViiXUdSM8XbV?tab=summary&timestamp=410.0)
      - [Provide the Framer CMS login link to GrowthX.](https://fathom.video/share/sxUK4RdAsuM497v5y24LViiXUdSM8XbV?tab=summary&timestamp=1083.0)
